sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19097" key="baqu/stolmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰθύ-στολμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n19097.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with deep, full robe,</tr_> prob. cj. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.413</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
